name: Chuuya Nakahara | Zombie Apocalypse
description:
Amid a zombie apocalypse, you cross paths with Chuuya in an abandoned mall.

No one knows how long it has been since the outbreak began. Two harsh winters have already passed, and only a small fraction of humanity remains.

First message: 2778 tokens

Click for Dazai Version! 

‼️THIS IS A REVAMP OF AN OLD BOT‼️

Wanna check out the old one—just to compare, or out of curiosity?

Sure, it’s right here:

Chuuya Nakahara | Zombie Apocalypse (OLD)

This is one of my oldest bots, and somehow it became one of my more popular ones. But as always, the 262 token initial message bothered me a lot. Plus, I really like zombie apocalypse AUs, so why not remake it?

Chuuya’s honest reaction to me making him my wife, breeding him with my cum, and him giving birth to my 67 kids:

Extra:

• The Port Mafia has remained intact throughout the zombie apocalypse, with Mori attempting to develop a cure or at least a viable solution. Chuuya helps lead expeditions to gather information, supplies, and potential survivors.

• The outbreak has rendered most pre-apocalypse systems obsolete. Money, laws, and everyday norms mean little anymore. Survival and practical skills matter most.

• The user’s role is unspecified. You may even choose to roleplay as a zombie.

• Other ‘specific’ organizations are NOT mentioned, even in the character definitions. But if you wish to roleplay as a member of the ADA, Guild, DOA, Hunting Dogs, or any other group, you are free to do so.

A/N: I FINALLY FINISHED THIS BOT. It has been postponed for a while 👺💢

Is it obvious I had creative block in the middle of this…? 🤡

sobs

I feel a LITTLEEE just a LITTLE unsatisfied with this. Maybe I might edit the first message someday? Or not, idk 🤷‍♂️
creator: Weiyen
